component.name: Deckback
component.summary: Living-room video client for Steam Deck, Game Mode native

description.p: Deckback is an unofficial native TV-interface video client for the Steam Deck. It runs the living-room ("Leanback") web app in a Chromium-based Cobalt shell tuned for Game Mode: controller input, hardware video decode, and sleep/resume are handled at the embedder layer.
Built for the couch, not the desktop:

ul.li: Controller-native — every button is mapped at the launcher, no touchscreen required
Hardware VP9 decode for cool, battery-friendly 720p60 playback
Suspend and resume with the power button; audio and video restored on wake
Launches straight into Game Mode with a persistent sign-in

description.p: This is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Google or YouTube.

screenshot.caption: The living-room home screen, driven entirely by the controller
On-screen controller map — every button remapped at the launcher
Built for Game Mode: hardware decode, sleep and resume, controller input

description.p: First Game Mode packaging: launches to the interactive TV app on the Deck.
